title: Remote Desktop and Screen-Sharing Setup (Windows and Mac)
text:
Q: How do I set up remote desktop and screen-sharing on my Windows or Mac computer?
A: For Windows: Step 1: Open the Start menu and type 'Remote Desktop Connection' to launch the app. Step 2: Enter the name or IP address of the computer you want to connect to. Step 3: Click 'Connect' and enter your company credentials when prompted. Step 4: Ensure that the remote computer has 'Allow remote connections to this computer' enabled in System Properties. For Mac: Step 1: Download and install the Microsoft Remote Desktop app from the App Store. Step 2: Open the app and click on 'Add PC'. Step 3: Enter the PC name or IP address and your company credentials. Step 4: Click 'Add' and then double-click the PC icon to start the remote session. For screen-sharing, both Windows and Mac users can utilize tools like Zoom or Microsoft Teams by starting a meeting and selecting 'Share Screen' to share their desktop with others.
